Happy.description: Upbeat and energetic music to match your joyful mood
Happy.vibe_message: You're radiating happiness! Here's a playlist that matches your incredible energy.
Happy.insight: Detected smile and raised cheeks indicate a happy mood, so upbeat and energetic music is recommended.

Sad.description: Soothing and healing music to comfort your heart
Sad.vibe_message: It's okay to feel this way. Here's a healing playlist to help you process your emotions.
Sad.insight: Detected downturned mouth and drooping features indicate sadness. Soothing, healing music can provide comfort.

Angry.description: Powerful music to channel and release your intensity
Angry.vibe_message: Channel that intensity! Here's music that matches your powerful energy and helps you release it.
Angry.insight: Detected furrowed brows and tense facial muscles indicate anger. Powerful music can help channel and release this energy.

Neutral.description: Balanced and trending music for your steady state
Neutral.vibe_message: You're in a balanced state. Here's a curated mix of trending and timeless tracks.
Neutral.insight: Neutral facial expression detected. A balanced playlist with varied energy levels is perfect for your current state.

Surprise.description: Dynamic and exciting music as unpredictable as your mood
Surprise.vibe_message: Something caught you off guard! Here's dynamic music full of surprises and excitement.
Surprise.insight: Raised eyebrows and wide eyes indicate surprise. Dynamic, exciting music with unexpected twists matches your energy.

Relaxed.description: Soft and ambient music for your peaceful state of mind
Relaxed.vibe_message: You seem beautifully calm. Here's a serene playlist for focus, peace, and gentle contemplation.
Relaxed.insight: Relaxed facial muscles and soft expression indicate a calm mood. Ambient and peaceful music enhances this wonderful state.
